goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'fusion' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'british' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the east
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve fusion food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food
